description:
## What it does

DefiLlama gateway over x402: read protocol TVL, fees/revenue and stablecoin metrics, multi-chain current & historical token prices with charts, and DeFi pool yields/APY — through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- Agents doing DeFi research, allocation and risk screening that need TVL / fees / stablecoin data.
- Pricing and valuation workflows that need multi-chain current and historical token prices.
- Yield scouting across pools by APY, TVL and risk.

## Endpoints

- `GET /protocols` — All protocols with current TVL, category and chain breakdown
- `GET /protocol/{slug}` — Single protocol: historical TVL, fees, tokens, metadata
- `GET /tvl/{protocol}` — Current total TVL of a protocol (lightweight)
- `GET /prices/current/{coins}` — Current USD price for one or many coins ({chain}:{address} or coingecko:{id}, comma-separated)
- `GET /prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}` — Historical USD price at a unix timestamp for one or many coins
- `GET /chart/{coins}` — Price chart (time series) for one or many coins
- `GET /percentage/{coins}` — Percentage price change over a period for one or many coins
- `GET /pools` — All yield pools with current APY, TVL, chain, project and risk flags
- `GET /chart/{pool}` — Historical APY / TVL time series for a single pool id

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet supports `exact` + `permit2` and `exact_gasfree`; Permit2 is the default and `exact_gasfree` remains optional:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols'
```

Pay on TRON Mainnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:0x2b6653dc \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain Mainnet (`eip155:56`, `exact` + `permit2`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-bsc/protocols'
```

Pay on BNB Smart Chain Mainnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-bsc/protocols' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

DefiLlama 的 x402 网关:读取协议 TVL、费用/收入与稳定币指标,多链代币现价+历史价+图表,以及 DeFi 资金池收益率/APY——一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC 两条付费路由。

## 适合场景

- 需要 TVL/费用/稳定币数据做 DeFi 研究、配置与风险筛查的 Agent。
- 需要多链现价与历史价的定价/估值流程。
- 按 APY、TVL 与风险挑选资金池。

## 接口

- `GET /protocols` — 所有协议的当前 TVL、分类与各链分布
- `GET /protocol/{slug}` — 单个协议:历史 TVL、费用、代币与元数据
- `GET /tvl/{protocol}` — 单个协议的当前总 TVL(轻量)
- `GET /prices/current/{coins}` — 一个或多个代币的当前美元价(支持 {chain}:{address} 或 coingecko:{id},逗号分隔)
- `GET /prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}` — 指定 unix 时间戳的历史美元价(单/多代币)
- `GET /chart/{coins}` — 一个或多个代币的价格时间序列(图表)
- `GET /percentage/{coins}` — 一个或多个代币某时段的涨跌幅
- `GET /pools` — 所有收益池的当前 APY、TVL、链、项目与风险标记
- `GET /chart/{pool}` — 单个资金池的历史 APY/TVL 时间序列

## 调用示例

这些是 x402 付费直通路由,通过 x402 支付后访问网关。TRON 主网同时支持 `exact` + `permit2` 和 `exact_gasfree`; 默认使用 Permit2，也可选择 `exact_gasfree`:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 TRON 主网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:0x2b6653dc \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain 主网(`eip155:56`,`exact` + `permit2`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-bsc/protocols'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 BNB Smart Chain 主网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-bsc/protocols' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```
